name: flint-installer
description: Flint installer — detects your AI coding agents and installs flint for each one.
author: Marcelover777

scripts.test:optimizer: node --test tests/core/*.test.mjs tests/hooks/*.test.mjs tests/mcp/*.test.mjs tests/commands/*.test.mjs flint/engine/tests/core/*.test.mjs flint/engine/tests/hooks/*.test.mjs flint/engine/tests/commands/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:all: node --test tests/installer/*.test.mjs tests/core/*.test.mjs tests/hooks/*.test.mjs tests/mcp/*.test.mjs tests/commands/*.test.mjs flint/engine/tests/core/*.test.mjs flint/engine/tests/hooks/*.test.mjs flint/engine/tests/commands/*.test.mjs && npm run test:legacy
scripts.test:legacy: node tests/test_flint_init.js && node tests/test_flint_stats.js && node tests/test_mcp_shrink.js && node tests/test_symlink_flag.js
